raw_text:
Senior iOS Engineer

Prism Labs is seeking an experienced Senior iOS Engineer to lead the technical architecture and

development of our flagship iOS application. You will own critical product features, mentor junior

engineers, and drive architectural decisions that impact millions of user interactions. This role

requires deep expertise in modern iOS development practices, including SwiftUI, reactive

programming, and performance optimization. You'll work cross-functionally with product and design

teams to ship polished, user-centric features while maintaining code quality and team standards.

About the Company

Prism Labs is a Series B mobile-first SaaS platform company focused on building next-generation

productivity tools for creative professionals. We serve over 50,000 active users across design,
photography, and content creation industries. Founded in 2020, we're headquartered in San

Francisco with a fully remote engineering team spanning 6 continents. Our mission is to create
seamless, beautiful iOS experiences that empower creators to focus on their craft, not their tools.

What You'll Own

1. Design and implement complex iOS features using SwiftUI and modern architecture patterns,

ensuring scalability and maintainability across a rapidly growing codebase

2. Lead architectural decisions for critical product systems, including offline synchronization using

Core Data and network layer optimization with URLSession

3. Mentor 2-3 junior iOS engineers through code reviews, pair programming sessions, and

technical guidance, elevating team capabilities and ensuring best practices

4. Optimize app performance metrics including launch time, memory usage, and battery

consumption; conduct profiling using Instruments and identify bottlenecks

5. Implement reactive data flows using Combine framework for predictable state management and

improved testability across feature modules

6. Collaborate with backend teams to design robust APIs and handle edge cases in production,

proactively addressing crashes and reliability issues

7. Establish and maintain iOS development standards, including Swift style guides, testing

strategies, and deployment procedures for App Store releases

at Prism Labs — Transforming mobile experiences through elegant, performant iOS applicationsSan Francisco, CA (Remote) • Full-time • $165,000 - $215,000 USD 8. Lead sprint planning and technical grooming sessions for iOS-specific work, breaking down

complex features into achievable tasks

Perks & Benefits

Competitive equity package (stock options) with early-stage growth potential

Comprehensive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) covering 100% of employee
premiums
Unlimited paid time off with a minimum 15-day annual recommendation
Professional development budget of $2,000 annually for conferences, courses, and learning
materials
Fully remote work environment with flexible hours and quarterly in-person team retreats
MacBook Pro and peripherals provided; upgrade cycle every 3 years

 Next Steps

Apply directly through our careers page at prism-labs.com/careers or send your resume, GitHub

profile, and a 1-2 paragraph note about why you're interested in the role to careers@prism-labs.com.

We review applications on a rolling basis.
